title: Tracking tickets with Complex Requests in each ticket
excerpt: Hi Team, we are using Monday.com as a ticketing system. Partners will submit a ticket request using Forms. One ticket may have dozens of asks in each ticket. Right now we have difficulties highlighting outstanding items …

posts.author: user8537 (Karl Schubert)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Team, we are using Monday.com as a ticketing system. Partners will submit a ticket request using Forms. One ticket may have dozens of asks in each ticket. Right now we have difficulties highlighting outstanding items within a ticket. For instance, if we have one ticket with 12 different requests, we may complete 11 but 1 may linger for weeks after due date. There are so many asks it seems like creating a subitem for each request, would be overkill. What is the best way to organize a ticket with many requests and highlight outstanding requests? Ideally we could create some automation stating the ticket is complete except for “X”. We are working on “X” still and will update when its completed. Open to any suggestions. thanks!
